codeReview.summary: The fix commit addresses the original blocking contract gap: `af setup [path]` now parses an optional path, passes it through dispatch, resolves/validates that path in setup, and persists it to config. Added parser and integration coverage explicitly exercises setup-with-path success/failure and post-setup behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The skill procedure requires running `bun run test:integration:real` (or explicitly documenting fallback when unavailable), but the fix handoff omits this command while reporting `followedProcedure: true`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/cli-refactor-worker/SKILL.md (Work Procedure step 6) vs handoff 2026-03-03T17-22-55-710Z__cli-core-setup-path-argument-contract-fix__91a071b7-c0e3-4667-bc31-b12d93395ec6.json -> verification.commandsRun (no test:integration:real entry).

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton, prior failed review, and both diffs (`e785ada`, `2eb1df3`). Original blockers were that setup ignored explicit path and tests missed that contract; the fix now implements and verifies explicit-path setup behavior, so the failure is resolved.
